ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fhir_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of FHIR resource (e.g., EvidenceReport, Patient, Practitioner, Organization) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the resource */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., clinical, administrative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidencereports" (
  "evidencereport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EvidenceReport resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FHIR resource it belongs to */,
  "implicit_rules" TEXT /* Implicit rules for the resource */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource content */,
  "meta" TEXT /* Metadata about the resource */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the evidence report (e.g., clinical, administrative) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evidence report (e.g., active, retired, draft) */,
  "author" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the evidence report */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence report was published */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the evidence report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidencereport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidencereports_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidencereports_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Patient resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FHIR resource it belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "deceased" TEXT /* Deceased status and date of the patient */,
  "primary_care_provider" INTEGER /* ID of the primary care provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" INTEGER /* ID of the emergency contact of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_care_provider FOREIGN KEY ("primary_care_provider") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_emergency_contact FOREIGN KEY ("emergency_contact") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioners" (
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Practitioner resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FHIR resource it belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the practitioner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the practitioner */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the practitioner */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the practitioner */,
  "licensure" TEXT /* Licensure information of the practitioner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the practitioner (phone, email) */,
  "organization" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the practitioner belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioners_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioners_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Organization resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FHIR resource it belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., hospital, clinic, lab) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_primary_contact FOREIGN KEY ("primary_contact") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, administrator, patient) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the resource */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., EvidenceReport, Patient, Practitioner, Organization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource type (e.g., clinical, administrative) */,
  "parent_type" INTEGER /* ID of the parent resource type if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FHIR resource it belongs to */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* Version ID of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., healthcare provider, administrator, patient) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role accessing the resource */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access control */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access control */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access control is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES fhir_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
